mapper.select: SELECT LOG_ID AS logId, USER_ID AS userId, ACTION, RESOURCE, DETAIL, IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, RESULT, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM AUDIT_LOGS WHERE LOG_ID = #{logId}

SELECT LOG_ID AS logId, USER_ID AS userId, ACTION, RESOURCE, DETAIL, IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, RESULT, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM AUDIT_LOGS WHERE LOG_ID IN
#{id}

SELECT LOG_ID AS logId, USER_ID AS userId, ACTION, RESOURCE, DETAIL, IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, RESULT, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM AUDIT_LOGS
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, LOG_ID DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT DISTINCT ACTION FROM AUDIT_LOGS ORDER BY ACTION

SELECT TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM AUDIT_LOGS WHERE CREATED_AT >= #{since} AND ACTION IN ('user.login', 'admin.login') AND RESULT = 0 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY date
SELECT USER_ID AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM AUDIT_LOGS WHERE CREATED_AT >= #{since} AND USER_ID LIKE CONCAT(#{idPrefix}, '%') GROUP BY USER_ID ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
